findings.title: Product list endpoint returns unbounded result set
findings.description: The listProducts endpoint does not apply pagination, meaning a large catalog will be returned in a single response. This risks high memory usage and slow response times.

findings.title: Product price field accepts negative values
findings.description: The product model does not validate that price is non-negative, allowing invalid records to be persisted.

findings.title: Product creation endpoint lacks authentication check
findings.description: The createProduct handler does not verify the caller is authenticated before writing to the products table, allowing unauthenticated product creation.

path_and_reason_header: Review path: native-only (below-threshold diff; reviewers: 2 native)
